chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-8114 of 2018 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) For Directions 1. For orders on CMA No.1021/2026 (Urgent Application) 2. For orders on CMA No.1022/2026 (Withdrawal of case) 20.01.2026 Mr. Muhammad Nishat Warsi, Advocate alongwith petitioner Mr. Muhammad Humayun, Advocate for respondent No.3 ---------------------- 1. Learned counsel for the petitioner pleads urgency on the ground that due to settlement between the parties outside the Court petitioner does not wish to proceed with this petition hence has maintained CMA No.1022 of 2026. Record supports his contention. Learned counsel for respondent No.3 extends his no objection. 2. In view of above, instant petition is hereby dismissed as not pressed alongwith pending application(s), if any. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE B-K Soomro
